languages.text: {n}Ответом на приказ стал гул множества воодушевленных голосов в вокс-канале. Передача завершилась, и подвластная вам армада истребителей, повинуясь приказам командующих, приняла боевое построение.{/n}

{n}The response to the order was the rumble of many excited voices on the vox-channel. The transmission ends, and your fighter armada, obeying the orders of the commanders, assumes battle formation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ответом на приказ стал гул множества воодушевленных голосов в вокс-канале. Передача завершилась, и подвластная вам армада истребителей, повинуясь приказам командующих, приняла боевое построение.{/n}

{n}The response to the order was the rumble of many excited voices on the vox-channel. The transmission ends, and your fighter armada, obeying the orders of the commanders, assumes battle formation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヴォクスチャネルから、多くの興奮した声のざわめきが返ってきた。通信終了。司令官の命令に従い、艦隊は戦闘配列をとり始める。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The response to the order was the rumble of many excited voices on the vox-channel. The transmission ends, and your armada, obeying the orders of the commanders, assumes battle formation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {j}voxチャネルから、多くの興奮した声のざわめきが返ってきた。通信終了。司令官の命令に従い、艦隊は戦闘配列をとり始める。{/j}

languages.text: {n}En respuesta a tu orden, oyes numerosas voces emocionadas por el canal de voco. La transmisión termina y tus cazas, siguiendo las órdenes de sus comandantes, asumen la formación de combate.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The response to the order was the rumble of many excited voices on the vox-channel. The transmission ends, and your fighter armada, obeying the orders of the commanders, assumes battle formation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En respuesta a tu orden, oyes numerosas voces emocionadas por el canal de voco. La transmisión termina y tus cazas, siguiendo las órdenes de sus comandantes, asumen la formación de combate.{/n}

languages.text: {n}回应命令的，是音阵频道中一片亢奋的嘈杂声浪。通讯结束，你的战斗机群遵照指挥官指令，迅速展开战斗阵型。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The response to the order was the rumble of many excited voices on the vox-channel. The transmission ends, and your fighter armada, obeying the orders of the commanders, assumes battle formation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}回应命令的，是音阵频道中一片亢奋的嘈杂声浪。通讯结束，你的战斗机群遵照指挥官指令，迅速展开战斗阵型。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Reaktion auf den Befehl war das Dröhnen vieler aufgeregter Stimmen auf dem Voxkanal. Die Übertragung endet und deine Armada geht auf Befehl der Kommandeure in Kampfformation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The response to the order was the rumble of many excited voices on the vox-channel. The transmission ends, and your fighter armada, obeying the orders of the commanders, assumes battle formation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Reaktion auf den Befehl war das Dröhnen vieler aufgeregter Stimmen auf dem Voxkanal. Die Übertragung endet und deine Armada geht auf Befehl der Kommandeure in Kampfformation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Emre verilen yanıt, voks kanalındaki pek çok heyecanlı sesin uğultusu oluyor. İletim sona eriyor ve filon, komutanların emirlerine uyarak savaş düzenine geçiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The response to the order was the rumble of many excited voices on the vox-channel. The transmission ends, and your fighter armada, obeying the orders of the commanders, assumes battle formation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En réponse à votre ordre, un grondement d'excitation retentit sur le canal-vox. La transmission s'achève et votre armada de chasseurs, sous la houlette de vos commandants, se met en formation de combat.{/n}
